text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're at UMASK, a store inside the train station,
and one of the headlines on the newspapers out
front catches our attention.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Trainer, look at this! Over here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's the popularity poll for the Takarazuka Kinen!
I'm in the top three!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And just one spot below McQueen. I can't believe
it, I made the top three.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: This is definitely a mistake... isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
A celebrity? Me? But... I don't feel like one in the
slightest.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Hey, look. Isn't that Mejiro Ryan over there?

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Ryan doesn't ride the train, does she? But
now that you mention it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Panicked, we hurry onto the train. There, we think
about how things are slowly beginning to change.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I thought I got into the Arima Kinen last year
because of McQueen's popularity.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But to be in the top three...
choice_data_list:
That's because of your great showing at the
Tenno Sho.

That's because of your great showing at the
Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Huh... If that's true, then it means my popularity is
linked to my race results, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So if I try even harder, then my popularity should
grow.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You know... That makes me really happy!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
There are people out there following what I'm
doing! A lot of them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Effort leads to skill, and skill leads to popularity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The clouds part and a ray of light shines through.
Whatever Mejiro Ryan wants... she just might get.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I think I have to give it up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I have to stop pretending to give up, stop
lying to myself. And...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I need to stop acting ashamed of my childish
dream, like some snob.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I really want to become a star Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I wanna be able to accept people's support, to
respond to them with dignity.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So in a race where everyone's selected by the
fans, I definitely wanna win!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I wanna win 'em both—this year's Takarazuka Kinen and Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning both of the big Grand Prix races in the
same year... If she can do that, she'll be a
superstar without a doubt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's a high bar to set...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Can I really take on this challenge? No, it's not
just a challenge.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's my dream, and I'll give 100% to make it come
true! I want us to achieve it together, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: All right! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I've finally got a huge dream, one that doesn't fall
short compared to McQueen's!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna make it come true with you by my side!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Trainer, have you seen the news?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
This year's Takarazuka Kinen will be held at
Kyoto Racecourse—the same as the spring Tenno
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She shows me the article, and it's true. It seems to
be due to the renovations going on at Hanshin
Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I get to race McQueen there, one more time...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I see. That's why she said the next time we'd meet
would be in a medium-distance race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
She already knew that I'd be picked for the
Takarazuka Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That also means McQueen is going to be in the
Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next battlefield has been decided. It's time
for Ryan to face her rival on a medium-distance
course, where she'll have the upper hand.
